title: Little Maid Create
description: Farm and Travel with Create's automation and Touhou-themed Maid companions.
body:
# Little Maid Create

Touhou Little Maid, Create and Farmer's Delight, along with a lot of optimisation, Quality of Life mods, and addons.


<details>
<summary>Main content Mods</summary>

- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/LNytGWDc) - Automation and Aethtetics
- [Touhou Little Maid](https://modrinth.com/mod/R0bDWFAW) - Maid companions, Touhou-themed items
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/R2OftAxM) - Farming and Food
- [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/hB899VmG) - Camera mod
- [Eirin Yagokoro Pharmacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/EhJXlu6k)- Touhou potions


</details>


<details>
<summary>Addons and Misc </summary>
  
- [Youkai's Homecoming](https://modrinth.com/mod/uJT3ahxz) - Touhou-themed food, Farmer's Delight addon 
- [Create Deco](https://modrinth.com/mod/sMvUb4Rb) - Create Decorations
- [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/GmjmRQ0A) - Create x Farmer's Delight
- [Create: Central Kitchen](https://modrinth.com/mod/btq68HMO) - Create x Farmer's Delight
- [Create: Enchantment Industry](https://modrinth.com/mod/JWGBpFUP) - Create Enchantment Automation
- [Create: Integrated Farming](https://modrinth.com/mod/9k1pAsfR) - Create Farming Automation
- [Create: Interiors](https://modrinth.com/mod/r4Knci2k) - Create Furniture
- [Create: Trading Floor](https://modrinth.com/mod/WROfLLvn) - Create Villager Trading Automation
- [Exposure Polaroid](https://modrinth.com/mod/WEWiqYkW) - Polaroid Camera
- [MaidUseHandCrank](https://modrinth.com/mod/kVNtrRcL) - Create x Touhou Little Maid compat
- [Maidsoul Kitchen](https://modrinth.com/mod/Q5ZXy0QB) - Touhou Little Maid x Farmer's Delight compat
- [Particular](https://modrinth.com/mod/pYFUU6cq) - Particles
- [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/pZ2wrerK) - Multiplayer emotes
- [Ears](https://modrinth.com/mod/mfzaZK3Z) - Skin additions

<details>
<summary>YUNG's structure mods</summary>

- [YUNG's Better Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/Dfu00ggU)
- [YUNG's Better Desert Temples](https://modrinth.com/mod/XNlO7sBv)
- [YUNG's Better Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/o1C1Dkj5)
- [YUNG's Better End Island](https://modrinth.com/mod/2BwBOmBQ)
- [YUNG's Better Jungle Temples](https://modrinth.com/mod/z9Ve58Ih)
- [YUNG's Better Mineshafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/HjmxVlSr)
- [YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses](https://modrinth.com/mod/Z2mXHnxP)
- [YUNG's Better Ocean Monuments](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dT9sgt4)
- [YUNG's Better Strongholds](https://modrinth.com/mod/kidLKymU)
- [YUNG's Better Witch Huts](https://modrinth.com/mod/t5FRdP87)
- [YUNG's Bridges](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ht4BfYp6)
- [YUNG's Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/ZYgyPyfq)


</details>

</details>



<details>
<summary>Quality of Life</summary>

- [Comforts](https://modrinth.com/mod/SaCpeal4) - Sleeping bags and Hammocks
- [Journeymap](https://modrinth.com/mod/lfHFW1mp) - World map and Minimap
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvQzSEkH) - See block information
- [Jade Addons](https://modrinth.com/mod/xuDOzCLy) - Jade mod support
- [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/fRiHVvU7) and [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/u6dRKJwZ) - item recipes
- [Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/ZcR9weSm)
- [Traveler's Titles](https://modrinth.com/mod/JtifUr64) - see biomes on entering
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/EsAfCjCV) - Detailed food information
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/aC3cM3Vq) - Inventory controls
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/xv94TkTM) - Better controls settings
- [CustomSkinLoader](https://modrinth.com/mod/idMHQ4n2) - Load skins in singleplayer/offline
- [Lootr](https://modrinth.com/mod/EltpO5cN) - Per-player chests

</details>


<details>
<summary>Optimisation and fixes</summary>

- [Alternate Current](https://modrinth.com/mod/r0v8vy1s) - Redstone 
- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/g96Z4WVZ) - Non-Rendering 
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/COlSi5iR) - Chunk generation
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/LQ3K71Q1) - Reduce fps on AFK
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB) - Entities
- [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs) - Memory
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ) - Server-side
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/QdG47OkI)
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/nmDcB62a) - Misc
- [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ps1zyz6x) - Lighting
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI) - Rendering

</details>


<details>
<summary>Dependencies</summary>

- [Cloth Config v15 API](https://modrinth.com/mod/9s6osm5g)
- [Create: Dragons Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/dzb1a5WV)
- [Kotlin for Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/ordsPcFz)
- [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/nU0bVIaL) - guidebook for TML
- [Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/fuuu3xnx)
- [YUNG's API](https://modrinth.com/mod/Ua7DFN59)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/1eAoo2KR)


</details>



## Open source

Most mods are open source (or have a non-libre CC license, but still publish sources and allow sharing deriative works), with exception of:


<details>
<summary>Source-availible mods</summary>

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI) (source-availible, Polyform-Shield)
- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB)  (source-availible, custom non-commercial license that allows redistribution)
- [Jade Addons](https://modrinth.com/mod/xuDOzCLy) (source-availible, All Right Reserved, modpack permission granted for Modrinth modpacks)
- [Journeymap](https://modrinth.com/mod/lfHFW1mp)  (source-availible, All Right Reserved, modpack permission granted)
- [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/GmjmRQ0A) (source-availible, All Right Reserved, modpack permission granted)


</details>



## License

Mods have their own licenses, but everything that could be considered my own work (for example, this readme text?) is licensed under MPL 2.0.

Logo is based on Public Domain/CC0 vector artwork from SVGRepo. Title text on featured screenshot is generated using Textcraft website.
